nasb.text: So you, too, outwardly appear righteous to men, but inwardly you are full of hypocrisy and lawlessness.

esv.text: So you also outwardly appear righteous to others, but within you are full of hypocrisy and lawlessness.

cnv.text: 照樣，你們外面看來像義人，裡面卻充塞著虛偽和不法。

ccb.text: 你们虚有公义的外表，内心却充满了各种的虚伪和罪恶。

csbs.text: 你们也是这样，你们外面对人显出公义，里面却充满了伪善和罪恶。
